title: Provider picker
description: Single-select for provider slug. Entitlement-aware — hides advanced providers (LinkedIn, Snapchat, Pinterest, GTM Server) on Small tier + hides Custom Webhook on Small tier.

items.$expr: [{ id: 'meta_capi', label: 'Meta Conversions API', description: 'Facebook + Instagram ad networks.', tier: 'all' }, { id: 'google_ads', label: 'Google Ads', description: 'Enhanced Conversions Upload for Google Ads campaigns.', tier: 'all' }, { id: 'google_analytics_4', label: 'Google Analytics 4', description: 'GA4 Measurement Protocol.', tier: 'all' }, { id: 'gtm_server', label: 'Google Tag Manager Server-side', description: 'Deliver to a tenant-hosted GTM Server container.', tier: 'advanced', disabled: !advanced_entitled }, { id: 'tiktok_events', label: 'TikTok Events API', description: 'Server-side conversion tracking for TikTok Ads.', tier: 'all' }, { id: 'linkedin_insight', label: 'LinkedIn Insight Tag', description: 'B2B-focused conversion tracking.', tier: 'advanced', disabled: !advanced_entitled }, { id: 'snapchat_capi', label: 'Snapchat Conversions API', description: 'Snap Ads conversion tracking.', tier: 'advanced', disabled: !advanced_entitled }, { id: 'pinterest_capi', label: 'Pinterest Conversions API', description: 'Pinterest Ads conversion tracking.', tier: 'advanced', disabled: !advanced_entitled }, { id: 'custom_webhook', label: 'Custom webhook', description: 'HMAC-signed JSON delivery. Escape hatch for Segment / Rudderstack / custom warehouses.', tier: 'medium', disabled: !custom_webhook_entitled }]

className.$expr: item.disabled ? 'p-4 opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : 'p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow'
